items.title: Man City move top with win as Burnley relegation confirmed
items.summary: Manchester City continue their charge towards the Premier League title with victory at Turf Moor to move Pep Guardiola's side top of the table and relegate Burnley back to the C...

items.title: All eyes on Dhoni and Rohit as IPL's defining rivalry returns
